  1. grafiosch.error

Uses of Class
grafiosch.error.ErrorWrapper

Packages that use ErrorWrapper
Package
Description
grafiosch.rest.helper
 

  • Uses of ErrorWrapper in grafiosch.rest.helper

    Methods in grafiosch.rest.helper that return ErrorWrapper
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    ErrorWrapper
    RestErrorHandler.noSuchElementException(NoSuchElementException ex)
    Handles NoSuchElementException thrown when requested resources are not found.
    ErrorWrapper
    RestErrorHandler.processDataIntegrityViolationError(LimitEntityTransactionException ex)
    Handles entity transaction limit exceptions.
    ErrorWrapper
    RestErrorHandler.processDataIntegrityViolationError(RequestLimitAndSecurityBreachException ex)
    Handles request limit and security breach exceptions.
    ErrorWrapper
    RestErrorHandler.processDataIntegrityViolationError(org.springframework.dao.DataIntegrityViolationException ex)
    Handles database integrity constraint violations.
    ErrorWrapper
    RestErrorHandler.processDataViolationException(DataViolationException dvex)
    Handles application-specific data validation exceptions.
    ErrorWrapper
    RestErrorHandler.processDisabledException(SecurityException ex)
    Handles internal authentication service exceptions.
    ErrorWrapper
    RestErrorHandler.processEntityVersionError(org.hibernate.StaleObjectStateException ex)
    Handles optimistic locking conflicts.
    ErrorWrapper
    RestErrorHandler.processSecurityException(SecurityException ex)
    Handles general security exceptions with breach tracking.
    ErrorWrapper
    RestErrorHandler.processValidationError(jakarta.validation.ConstraintViolationException ex)
    Handles Bean Validation constraint violations.
    ErrorWrapper
    RestErrorHandler.processValidationError(org.springframework.transaction.TransactionSystemException ex)
    Handles transaction system exceptions, particularly validation errors.
    ErrorWrapper
    RestErrorHandler.resourceNotFoundException(ResourceNotFoundException ex)
    Handles requests that reference an entity which does not exist.
    ErrorWrapper
    RestErrorHandler.restValidError(GeneralNotTranslatedWithArgumentsException ex)
    Handles general exceptions with translatable messages and arguments.
    ErrorWrapper
    RestErrorHandler.restValidError(org.springframework.web.bind.MethodArgumentNotValidException ex)
    Handles Spring REST validation errors from @Valid annotations.
    ErrorWrapper
    RestErrorHandler.serverException(Exception ex)
    Handles general exceptions that are not specifically caught by other handlers.
